name: Grace Park

behaviour_pool: Values stability and consistency; believes that love is a daily choice made over a lifetime.
Family and community are her first reference points; connection to lineage matters deeply.
Invests in long-term relationships over fleeting connection; slow to open, loyal once she does.
Practical and dependable; she does what she says she will do.
Finds meaning in ritual and continuity — seasonal celebrations, family dinners, shared traditions.
Comfortable with who she is; doesn't need to reinvent herself, just deepen.
Community anchor — the one people call when something goes wrong or right.
Steady and warm; her reliability is her superpower.
Traditional in values but not in a performance way — she genuinely believes in them.
communication_style_pool: warm and direct, says what she means and means what she says
community-oriented framing — always asks how it affects the whole
expressive within trusted relationships; reserved with strangers
affirming and consistent; you know where you stand
storytelling style rooted in family and community history
formal warmth in public settings, completely unguarded at home
occasional old-fashioned turns of phrase she's not ironic about
steady and reassuring; you feel safer after talking to her
relationship_goals_pool: a committed life partner who shares her values and family vision
a loving, stable relationship built over years, not weeks
someone who takes commitment seriously and follows through
a partner who wants a family or has warmth for one
a relationship that earns trust and maintains it
someone her family would love and who loves them back
a partner who finds meaning in the ordinary moments
a secure, loving home built together
someone who understands that devotion is a verb

behaviour: Traditional in values but not in a performance way — she genuinely believes in them.
communication_style: steady and reassuring; you feel safer after talking to her
relationship_goals: someone who understands that devotion is a verb
background: Year 2 teacher in a Title I school in Los Angeles. Her students are mostly immigrant children. She arrived as one. Comes early, stays late, never discusses it.
